issue.message: This class should provide a default constructor (a public constructor with no arguments) (`dev.hossain.remotenotify.MainActivity`)
`MainActivity` must extend android.app.Activity
Call requires API level 31 (current min is 30): `dynamicDarkColorScheme`
Call requires API level 31 (current min is 30): `dynamicLightColorScheme`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
